creator: jah@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244369
dmesg for server in question

After updating all packages on an existing (working) 13-stable system, startx fails with "Cannot run in framebuffer mode. Please specify busIDs for all framebuffer devices".  Rolling back just xorg-server to the previous installed version (21.1.8,1) from /var/cache/pkg fixes the problem.

I'm not absolutely certain, but I suspect https://reviews.freebsd.org/D39886 may be the culprit, as it appears to be the only non-trivial changes that could affect my (amdgpu) configuration between the working and failing xorg-server versions.

Attaching dmesg and Xorg.0.log for the working and failing cases.
